summary: CRITICAL GAPS: Task explicitly required TDD (write failing test first, then code)—no test file exists. Required fixtures missing entirely. No act test harness; no act-result.txt artifact. Workflow uses unpinned action ref (v4 instead of SHA). Script exits 0 even when tests fail (line end: `sys.exit(0)` instead of `sys.exit(1)`). Missing ~60% of deliverable: tests, fixtures, integration validation, all via act. Script core logic is readable but untested; workflow is barebones.
